reviews.review_description: Set to seated. First of all I ended up in the middle of the desk, not in front of it. When I got to the barn I got the watch, invitation, thing hidden in the straw,  and made the tool for the door. It was in my left hand, I tried to swap it to my right hand, it disappeared (was not in my inventory). Went back to last point, it was in the inventory but the watch wasn’t there anymore. Watch is on the floor and I can’t reach far enough to pick it up. Then I tried to use the tool for the door again and dropped it. It disappeared again. But when something disappears from the inventory case it shows numbers instead? Where the tool was now says 2 and where the watch was says 3…? If there’s anything I can do about this I’d like to try the game again, if not, I’ll be asking about a refund.

Any decent walkthroughs out there for this game? 
I love it but hate getting stuck for a lifetime on one particular puzzle.

I just came down the elevator to the round room with swastikas on the wall I’m stuck at the one panel with the spinning maze and the lever with the swastika at the head of it that you get by opening one of the drawers in the center of the room, idk if I’m doing something wrong but I’ve been stuck there for 3 days now and no matter what I do I can’t get the openings to line up, the vertical level doesn’t seem to be doing anything when I pull it down since I can’t push it upwards. I spin the lever to slow down the first ring and I noticed it moves at the same speed as the third ring in, coming from the outside. I absolutely love these types of games so if someone could please explain to me how they solved it I’d be forever grateful.

First off I want to give the Devs a thumbs up!! It’s not finished yet but it’s on its way to a 5 star game fs!! 
Okay I am stuck in the room with the record player. Unfortunately I can’t see the records and I know that the “White” centered record is will activate the knob for something else. I won’t ruin it totally but I can’t do what needs to be placed on Octopus for door entry. This has left me very frustrated so PLEASE help me to move forward. I will update my review once I am able to go further. TIA Devs!!

developer_response.body:
Hi Lisa!
We're delighted that Winston Wayne has captured your interest. In addition to this platform, you can also connect with us via email and share your suggestions:
<<<mail@somniumporta.com>>>
In the place where you are stuck, you have to play the right disc (which is not next to the gramophone) to get something from there...
You can quickly check out the game's walkthrough from this link to enhance your gaming experience without any hassle:
<<<<<<https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Vo87Ob2Y1DN8Z9PtYc12kSVghqLW3x8A?usp=sharing>>>>

reviews.review_title: I was so excited for this.....
reviews.review_description: I honestly do not know how to rate this at the moment. The puzzles and the game story and atmosphere itself are great, right up my alley. The game development is currently pretty horrendous. I have tested many puzzle games and have always been able to contact the developer to ask for some type of video clip or to send them the issues I'm having. I had to stop playing this game as I am in the train tunnels. I went through the first pass gate, then to the second pass gate door but you need tools to open in which you have to go another direction where you are trapped in as an iron bar design blocks you.... You have a rubber mallet and apparently you have to hit the weak spots to break down the gate and get through it. I have literally spent hours hitting these iron bars at their weak spots and some completely break after hitting them for a good 45 minutes, they just float in the air and do nothing else I am forever stuck in this part of the tunnel with the tools I need to go through the second pass gate but cannot get to it. There is no walk through for this game anywhere, there is no way to contact the dev's, and at this point there's no way to progress I am literally almost done with it and have one more chapter after the tunnels and I can't do anything with this. Also I saw the announcement of a patch there is no update that I can do in my headset other than uninstall and reinstall the game and I am not going through everything all over again..... Is this game could be fixed it would be brilliant, but this was not ready to be sold at any price at this point. I've also had the same issues as others posting but as long as I can get through a game I put up with pretty much anything I have had to restart level several times due to glitches and falling through the game as well.

developer_response.body:
Hi There!
You've made a lot of progress and that makes us super happy. We're more than glad that you've chosen our game.
You can find our email address on our game page and have the videos you mentioned ready. We're privately sharing them through our community with users who can't progress through the story.
We'll be happy to send them over if we receive an email at mail@somniumporta.com
And, about the gate you mentioned. You still haven't solved the puzzle. There's a hidden room there with lots of secrets to uncover,Look more closely at the walls...

************
Hi Again Jennifer!

We've been in touch via email. Nevertheless, we're also providing the links to Walkthrough videos here to ensure they reach you and others who read the reviews. So, in case you need it at any point in the game to solve puzzles, it's readily available:
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Vo87Ob2Y1DN8Z9PtYc12kSVghqLW3x8A?usp=sharing

reviews.review_description:
I love the storyline.  And there are no easy-solves in this one.  You are guided via teleportation spots in which you can investigate the scene(s).  Occasionally things can be difficult to grasp or toggle, but for the most part... I was engaged and determined to find the answers.  This is my favorite genre to play, so I have seen quite a few games in this category.  This game felt like you had to use real-world solutions to approach some of the puzzles.  I couldn't just fake my way through this one.  There is more than 1 way to solve some of the puzzles, which kept it interesting on my 2nd play-through.  I found myself thinking of this game and how to solve what I was stuck on, even when I would step away for a break.  I definitely recommend this one, but I hope that some of the quirks get ironed out.  I am not yet finished with the game, but I learned that I am over 85% complete at this point.  The game is a bit dark in spots, hard to see, and I occasionally struggled to align myself to the correct spot and needed to teleport away and back to correct my position (even with the in-game recentering option).  And at one point, I had to stand even while playing in the seated position to reach a lever.

Spoiler alert / quirk example:
One example is when I was on the tracks flipping the toggle switches right before the railcar control panel appears.  There were 2 horizontal switches that eventually folded in flat.  On my first play-through, a 3rd toggle (vertical) switch appeared on the left-side of the railcar.  Not a problem.  When I played through the 2nd time, that 3rd switch was missing.  When I went to reach for it, it appeared as I reached through the outer wall of the railcar.  Had I not seen it the 1st play-through, it would have baffled me on the 2nd play-through.  There weren't many of these examples, but there were enough that I needed to take a break... restart that section... and everything would load better/properly on a re-do.  I hope those issues get ironed out.  It appears to be a load issue as some scenes don't load when I completed a section.  I'm glad I played it through multiple times.

reviews.review_title: On oculus, cant solve the cave walkthru
reviews.review_description: On oculus,  in the cave walkthrough where you have to use a lever to move the two bolts, that just doesnt work.  I have the walkthrough mp4 it just doesnt work on the oculus.
I can’t get out of the office, in the very first scene.  Disappointed.

developer_response.body: Hi Gladball please reach out to us at mail@somniumporta.com and we can provide the walkthrough. This is a puzzle game and we are working on creating more hints for the final version of the game.

reviews.review_title: Love game but need more hints
reviews.review_description: I’m in love with this game, but am unfortunately in the same boat as @wsouthern with the code at the first tunnel gate. Also not sure if he had this same problem as me as well, but I always get stuck in the commander’s room. I’m able to get all the clues & info needed from that room but can never open the safe door to get out. Please reach out & help me with these issues so I don’t go insane. 😅🥲❤️

It is an amazing game and I have solved all the puzzles up to the first gate on the rail line and I cannot get the gate to open after I have entered the fist gate code. Is there a walkthrough for this game as I have tried everything to get the gate open. I’m stuck at this point and cannot move on.

developer_response.body: Hi W! I have responded to your email and provided the walkthrough. It's amazing to hear from you guys that you enjoyed DWW.

reviews.review_description:
The game is awesome. I absolutely love everything about it  EXCEPT - - 
I have been trying for over 3 weeks now to get a hold of the devs. I've been stuck in the train tunnels in the room with the gas for over 3 weeks!! I need some help!!! I have literally tried everything I can possibly think of to get a hold of the devs and have had zero luck!! I would easily give this game five stars if the devs could just contact me and help me out. PLEASE.

Ive been n 1st scene for hour.first I cant stand comfort shading. Not immersive and honestly never seen game where option wasn't avalibble to turn it off so. Plz add free movement  Teleport spots are no where near where u can reach and grab  things and no the recenter doesnt help at all. Needs distant grab added also caus of that reason.Honestly dnt get this if u r wheelchair bound and even tried  standing, and still can't grt items off top of shelves  i kmw these updates take time  only reason i put any stars on this review caus its understandable. will c developers respond and say that they working on this. As for me thats the only way i can play it Wanted to offer 25% off also  LINK in bio but wouldn't recommend it rn, wait til update. Hopefully soon. Oh need to add u can climb ladders but cant hardly reach  it to climb, all us sitting only people will b anxiously waiting caus knw the demo was way better then what I hav seen so far. Bummed yall😒 wil b cking daily for changes when do I will happily edit stars and review.hav a blessed one guys oh yeah come bk when fixed  and get discount will b here n bio EDIT: finished barn finally but had to mention the suitcase inventory is way too far away and can't reach unfortunately. So so many negatives just want it to b successful caus I knw it has that potential and honestly nt a ton of detective type quest 2 or that has subtitles on this quest. I'm deaf so ty ty and actually changing stars to 4 just for that being avalible !!hope all this does is help yall get this game where I knw it deserves to b 😉😊

I saw the demo of this and it looked good but this game isn't good at the moment. I cannot reach where I need to while sat down. I had to change my floor level to reach the drawer and get the lighter and cigar out. Also not liking that there is no free movement as where I am able to stand in the game is nowhere near where I'm to pick things up

developer_response.body:
Hi Gemma!
It's always great to hear feedbacks and We're glad you'd liked our Demo version. Regarding your issue, have you set the settings to seated mode? If not, please consider doing it first and try playing the game with that setup. Looking forward to hear from you!

reviews.review_description: I thoroughly enjoyed my experience with this game. It truly immerses you in the role of a detective, as the puzzles are challenging and require extensive investigation of the environment and items. The level design is exceptionally well-crafted, with every element serving a purpose. Having completed the second level, I find myself eagerly anticipating what lies ahead in the rest of the game. If you're a fan of classic puzzle adventure games, I highly recommend giving it a try.
amazing game, so adventurous and exciting!

developer_response.body: We're so delighted that you'd like the game. Make sure to tell your friends about it!
